# Security policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security problems.**

Report privately via one of:

- GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/use-retoo/scena/security/advisories/new) (preferred).
- Email **[support@retoo.ru](mailto:support@retoo.ru)** with `security` in the subject.

Please include:

- Affected version of `@retoo/scena`.
- Minimal reproduction or proof-of-concept.
- Impact you observed.

You will receive an acknowledgement within **3 business days**. We aim to ship a fix or mitigation within **30 days**, faster for actively exploited issues.

## Supported versions

Only the latest minor of the current major receives security fixes. Older majors are out of support unless stated otherwise in a release note.
